FieldUpdatesNested.description: Contains the data to create a field update action.

update_type.description: Specify how to update the field. This key is supported only for the multi-select fields.

apply_assignment_threshold.description: Indicates whether assignment-threshold rules should be applied when updating the field.

module.description: Specify the module details where the field update should be applied. (Required)

type.description: Specify the type of field update. (Required)

notify.description: Specify whether or not to send email notifications to the new owner.

feature_type.description: Specify the automation feature in which you want to use the field update.

field.description: Specify the API name and the unique ID of the field to be updated. (Required)

dependent_fields.description: Specify the dependent fields that are affected when the target field is updated

related_records.description: Specify the list of related modules (Tasks, Calls and Events) whose ownership should also be updated.

name.description: Specify the name of the field update action. (Required)

value.description: Specify the value to set in the specified field. (Required)

oneOf.description: String value for the field update.
Array of string values for the field update.

items.description: String value for the field update.

ParamQueryPage.name: page
ParamQueryPage.description: To get the list of field updates from the respective pages. The default value is 1

ParamQueryPerPage.name: per_page
ParamQueryPerPage.description: Specify how many field updates to return per page. The default and the maximum possible value is 200

ParamQueryIncludeInnerDetails.name: include_inner_details
ParamQueryIncludeInnerDetails.description: To retrieve additional details about the field associated with the field update.

ParamQueryIncludeInnerDetails1.name: include_inner_details
ParamQueryIncludeInnerDetails1.description: To retrieve additional details about the field associated with each field update.

ParamQuerySortOrder.name: sort_order
ParamQuerySortOrder.description: To sort the available list of field updates in either ascending or descending order, based on the value of "sort_by" parameter

ParamQueryIds.name: ids
ParamQueryIds.description: The unique field update IDs you want to delete

ParamQuerySortBy.name: sort_by
ParamQuerySortBy.description: To sort the list of field updates. By default, the response is sorted by Created_Time.
